hae-won.position: foreground-left at the cordon, larger, mid-step over the rope
hae-won.pose: one hand pushing the rope down, the other out for balance, sandals left behind — exactly two hands

cel.position: background-right, smaller, already past the cordon wading toward the water, half-turned to wave Hae-won on
cel.pose: one hand waving her forward, the other holding her pulled-off tank — exactly two hands

diagonal axis across the cordon toward the water
prop rope cordon present; coverage preserved (swimsuit beneath Cel's removed tank)
